title: Cheiloclinium serratum

intro: Cheiloclinium serratum, also known as 'Wild Yam', is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, and research has shown that it possesses various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-diabetic activities. The bioactive constituents of C. serratum include alkaloids, glycosides, and saponins, which are responsible for its pharmacological activities.
